raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section advances a specific thesis — formal Lyapunov guarantees coupled to language grounding — plus an explicit gap statement against existing systems; a review must assess whether that framing is coherent and the contribution claim is accurate.","R1.2":"There is a material internal inconsistency: the abstract promises formal Lyapunov stability guarantees, yet the described switching mechanism is purely heuristic (confidence-threshold ranking with a grid-searched τ); no stability proof or Lyapunov function is exhibited, making logical consistency a central review target.","R1.3":"The experimental evidence (failure-rate reduction, Likert scores) is real but does not directly support the formal-stability claim; the gap between the methods-level promise and the evaluation-level evidence must be flagged.","R1.6":"An unqualified 'review this section' delegation normally encompasses prose quality; sentence-level and paragraph-level writing polish is a central expected responsibility."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize technical soundness — specifically checking whether the Lyapunov-guarantee claim is logically supported by the described switching mechanism and experimental evidence — or is the primary goal writing and prose quality improvement?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section advances a specific thesis — formal Lyapunov guarantees coupled to language grounding — plus an explicit gap statement against existing systems; a review must assess whether that framing is coherent and the contribution claim is accurate.
rationale.R1.2: There is a material internal inconsistency: the abstract promises formal Lyapunov stability guarantees, yet the described switching mechanism is purely heuristic (confidence-threshold ranking with a grid-searched τ); no stability proof or Lyapunov function is exhibited, making logical consistency a central review target.
rationale.R1.3: The experimental evidence (failure-rate reduction, Likert scores) is real but does not directly support the formal-stability claim; the gap between the methods-level promise and the evaluation-level evidence must be flagged.
rationale.R1.6: An unqualified 'review this section' delegation normally encompasses prose quality; sentence-level and paragraph-level writing polish is a central expected responsibility.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize technical soundness — specifically checking whether the Lyapunov-guarantee claim is logically supported by the described switching mechanism and experimental evidence — or is the primary goal writing and prose quality improvement?
